name: pipelex
description: Skills and hooks for working with AI methods following the MTHDS standard.

api_key.title: Pipelex API key
api_key.description: API key for the hosted Pipelex API (bundle validation and runs). Get one at https://app.pipelex.com. Leave empty to work offline: local lint/format still run; validation and runs are skipped.

base_url.title: Pipelex API base URL
base_url.description: Origin of the Pipelex API, host-only (e.g. https://api.pipelex.com). Leave empty for the hosted default.
